title: Maureen Raymond
compiled_truth: Maureen Raymond is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2002-01-15), Maureen Raymond sent 34 and received 238 emails, totalling 272 interactions. Top correspondents: [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (15), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (13), [Alhamd Alkhayat](people/alhamd-alkhayat) (11), [Gwyn Koepke](people/gwyn-koepke) (10), [Gary Hickerson](people/gary-hickerson) (9).
